chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 695 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.3272/2019 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.3273/2019 17.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Mrs. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate for respondent No.1 Per learned counsel for the applicant, three distinct appeals have been decided vide common order without any independent discussion and / or deliberation of particular facts and circumstances. He further states that the impugned order is devoid of any independent reasons and merely rests on reproduction of arguments etc. Learned counsel seeks that the impugned order be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh. Learned counsel for respondent No.1 articulates no cavil to the aforesaid. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
